title: Grey Steel Metal Hooks with Self-Adhesive Backing, Pack of 6 - Holds Up to 0.5kg, Minimalist Design, Ideal for Home Use
features: MINIMALIST DESIGN: The minimalist design and neutral grey color make these hooks a subtle yet stylish addition to any home decor. They're not just functional; they enhance the appearance of any room.
HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS: Crafted from durable steel, these hooks are designed to withstand daily use, offering both strength and style with their elegant grey finish.

EFFORTLESS INSTALLATION: Equipped with a powerful self-adhesive backing, these hooks can be easily mounted on any clean, smooth surface without the need for drilling or tools, offering a hassle-free setup.

VERSATILE FUNCTIONALITY: Capable of holding up to 0.5kg, these pack of 6 hooks are perfect for hanging keys, small kitchen utensils, lightweight decor items, and more, making them ideal for use throughout the home.
STRONG ADHESION: Each grey steel metal hook comes equipped with a powerful self-adhesive backing, ensuring it sticks firmly to any smooth surface without the need for drilling or screws.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: This premium quality hook features a self-adhesive back with a metal front and hook and is capable of holding up to 0.5kg. The pack contains six self-adhesive hooks. Safety Warning No warning applicable
